meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Elentaria
products.tagline: Your GTM: from diagnosis to execution
products.summaryZh: 你的GTM：从诊断到执行
products.descriptionZh: Elentaria是面向B2B的AI运营工具：它分析你的业务，对22个渠道进行评分，交付适配的方案，并学习哪些因素推动了收入增长，从而让下一周的策略更精准。每周，在你的技术栈上，用你的语言风格运行。
products.description: Elentaria is the AI operator for B2B: it analyzes your business, scores 22 channels, ships the plan that fits, and learns what moved revenue so it can make the next week sharper. Every week, on your stack, in your voice.

products.name: InsForge Backend Branching
products.tagline: Git style branching for your backend
products.summaryZh: 为后端提供Git风格的分支管理
products.descriptionZh: 为整个后端提供 Git 风格的分支。创建一个分支即可获得完整、隔离的副本，涵盖数据库、存储、认证、边缘函数等所有内容，供你的代理在不影响生产环境的前提下进行实验。
products.description: Git-style branching for your entire backend. Spin off a branch to get a full, isolated copy of everything: your database, storage, auth, edge functions, and more, ready for your agents to experiment on without touching production.

products.name: superlog
products.tagline: Make your product bug-free
products.summaryZh: 确保您的产品无缺陷
products.descriptionZh: Superlog 是一款开源自主可观测性工具。它能自动安装并修复发现的错误。只需一条指令，即可用 OpenTelemetry 检测你的代码仓库并保持更新。当出现故障时，它会将杂乱的告警归并为单一事件，并在 Slack 中发布一个可直接合并的 PR。与 Datadog 或 Sentry 不同，它无需配置、无告警疲劳、无需手动修复。你的遥测数据保持厂商中立，从而完全掌控数据。
products.description: Superlog is an open-source autonomous observability tool. It installs itself and fixes the bugs it finds. With a single prompt, it instruments your repository with OpenTelemetry and keeps it up-to-date. When something breaks, it groups noisy issues into a single incident and posts one mergeable PR in Slack. Unlike Datadog or Sentry, there's no setup, no alert fatigue, and no manual fixing. Your telemetry stays vendor-neutral, so you keep full control of your data.

products.name: Franz 6
products.tagline: All your messaging apps in one window — with private AI
products.summaryZh: 所有即时通讯应用汇聚于同一窗口——配备隐私AI
products.descriptionZh: WhatsApp、Slack、Signal、Telegram、Gmail、Outlook 及 75 余项服务整合于一款高速桌面应用——无需再在十个浏览器标签页间切换。Franz 6 新增内置 AI 助手，可总结长对话、转录语音消息、分类管理收件箱并草拟回复——所有处理均在本地完成，确保对话隐私（可选欧盟托管云服务）。下载量超 100 万次。免费、跨平台，源自维也纳。获奖：Product Hunt 金猫奖，2016 年度桌面应用。
products.description: WhatsApp, Slack, Signal, Telegram, Gmail, Outlook and 75+ services in one fast desktop app — no more juggling ten browser tabs. Franz 6 adds a built-in AI assistant that summarizes long chats, transcribes voice notes, triages your inbox and drafts replies — all on-device, so your conversations stay private (EU-hosted Cloud optional). 1M+ downloads. Free, cross-platform, made in Vienna. Winner: Product Hunt Golden Kitty, Desktop App of the Year 2016.

products.name: Replicas
products.tagline: Run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud
products.summaryZh: 在云端运行 Claude Code 和 Codex
products.descriptionZh: 随时随地运行后台编码代理。在虚拟机中启动Claude Code或Codex，代码和工具已准备就绪。通过Slack、Linear或GitHub移交任务。Replicas在云端运行Claude Code、Codex或任何编码代理。代理在隔离的虚拟机中运行，配备真实的开发环境，您可以使用自己的订阅和API密钥。从Slack、Linear或GitHub触发任务，返回时即可看到待审查的PR。
products.description: Run background coding agents from anywhere. Spawn Claude Code or Codex in a VM with code and tooling ready to go. Hand off tasks from Slack, Linear, or GitHub Replicas runs Claude Code, Codex, or any coding agent in the cloud. Agents run in isolated VMs with real dev environments, and you can bring your own subscriptions and API keys. Trigger tasks from Slack, Linear, or GitHub and come back to a PR ready to review.

products.name: Hermes Desktop
products.tagline: The agent that grows with you
products.summaryZh: 与您一同成长的智能体
products.descriptionZh: Hermes Desktop — 开源智能体，伴你成长，现已推出macOS、Windows和Linux原生应用。由Nous Research开发。
products.description: Hermes Desktop — the open-source agent that grows with you, now a native app for macOS, Windows, and Linux. By Nous Research.

products.name: Spectron
products.tagline: Agent memory you can trust
products.summaryZh: 您可以信赖的代理记忆
products.descriptionZh: Spectron 是基于单一 ACID 基质的智能体记忆系统。图、向量、文档与结构化行在同一事务中提交。每条事实都携带溯源信息。修正覆盖而非覆写。混合检索融合向量、图、BM25 与关键词。追踪反馈至排序。支持三时态事实、多租户作用域与 MCP。无拼接存储，无同步管道。
products.description: Spectron is agent memory built on one ACID substrate. Graph, vectors, documents, and structured rows commit in one transaction. Every fact carries provenance. Corrections supersede, never overwrite. Hybrid retrieval fuses vectors, graph, BM25, and keywords. Traces feed back into ranking. Tri-temporal facts, multi-tenant scopes, and MCP support. No stitched stores. No sync pipelines.

products.name: Uselink
products.tagline: host your html, share the link, and get comments
products.summaryZh: 托管你的HTML，分享链接，获取评论
products.descriptionZh: uselink 可将任意 HTML 或 Markdown 转换为你可控制的简洁链接。粘贴文档，即可获得一个属于你的 URL，并决定谁可以阅读、谁可以评论。读者无需账号即可在话题中回复，这是 Google Docs 和 Notion 无法做到的。交互式 HTML 可实际运行。可添加密码、有效期或查看次数限制，并保留所有版本。本次发布的新功能包括：无需代码即可编辑实时页面的可视化编辑器，以及一个 MCP 服务器，让 Claude、Cursor 或 n8n 可为你发布内容。
products.description: uselink turns any HTML or Markdown into a clean link you control. paste a doc, get a url under your handle, decide who can read and who can comment. readers reply in threads with no account, which Google Docs and Notion can't do. interactive HTML actually runs. add a password, an expiry, or a view limit, and keep every version. new this launch: a visual editor to edit live pages with no code, and an MCP server so Claude, Cursor, or n8n can publish for you.

products.name: Town
products.tagline: The assistant that learns how you work, then gets to work.
products.summaryZh: 一个能学习你工作方式，然后开始工作的助手。
products.descriptionZh: Town 是一款异常得力的 AI 助手。它学习你的工作方式，而非让你适应它：你的语言、你的人际关系、你的工作模式。它在你工作的各个场景中发挥作用，涵盖邮件、日历、文档和消息。它能帮你起草回复、处理日程安排，并为重复性工作建立流程。它学得越多，能独立完成的任务就越多，从而让你把时间投入到只有你才能完成的工作上。无需宏大构想。
products.description: Town is the unusually helpful AI assistant. It learns how you work, not the other way around: your voice, your people, your patterns. It works where you do, across email, calendar, docs, and messages. It drafts your replies, handles your scheduling, and builds routines for the work you repeat. The more it learns, the more it does on its own, so your time goes to the work only you can do.o big ideas.

products.name: Composer
products.tagline: Multiplayer markdown for you, your team, and your agents.
products.summaryZh: 多人协作的 Markdown，适用于你、你的团队以及你的智能代理。
products.descriptionZh: Composer 是一款实时多人协作的 Markdown 编辑器，支持人类与智能体并肩工作。您可以即时将智能体生成的 Markdown 内容分享给团队成员，进行实时编辑、添加评论与建议，并共享上下文。您的智能体将作为真正的协作者，直接与您及团队一同工作。
products.description: Composer is a real-time, multiplayer markdown editor where people and agents can work side-by-side. Instantly share markdown generated by your agent with teammates, edit in real time, leave comments, suggestions, and share context. Your agents join as true collaborators, working directly alongside you and your team.

products.name: Brand Context API
products.tagline: Ship AI that stays on-brand
products.summaryZh: 保持品牌一致的AI部署方案
products.descriptionZh: Brand Context API 通过一次调用返回公司的品牌身份信息：语调、使命、产品、受众，从而确保你的AI保持品牌一致性。借助这些结构化数据，你的产品从首次提示起就能输出有据可依的内容。
products.description: Brand Context API keeps your AI on-brand by returning a company's brand identity in one call: voice, mission, products, audience. With this structured data, your product ships output that's grounded from the first prompt.

products.name: Devin Desktop
products.tagline: Manage fleets of local and cloud agents from one surface
products.summaryZh: 从统一界面管理本地和云端代理集群
products.descriptionZh: 在一个界面管理本地和云端代理集群。无需离开编辑器即可完成规划、委派、审查和发布。
products.description: Manage fleets of local and cloud agents from one surface. Plan, delegate, review, and ship without leaving your editor.

products.name: Forward
products.tagline: Installs your API into a customer's codebase in one command
products.summaryZh: 一行命令即可将你的 API 安装到客户的代码库中。
products.descriptionZh: Forward 是一款 AI 前向部署工程师，能将你的 API 直接集成到客户的代码库中。用户无需阅读 50 页的文档，只需运行一条命令。Forward 会分析他们的仓库，在新分支上编写集成代码，运行测试，并创建 PR 供审查。专为 API 和 SDK 公司打造，旨在消除从注册到首次成功调用之间的用户流失。它能学习你的代码风格，并通过构建验证确保安全性——同时为用户节省数小时的手动对接时间。
products.description: Forward is an AI forward-deployed engineer that integrates your API directly into your customers' codebases. Instead of 50-page docs, users run one command. Forward analyzes their repo, writes the integration on a new branch, runs tests, and opens a PR for review. Built for API and SDK companies to eliminate churn between signup and the first successful call. It learns your house style and ensures safety through build validation—all while saving users hours of manual wiring.

products.name: FolderPlus
products.tagline: Peek inside any folder without opening it
products.summaryZh: 无需打开文件夹，即可预览其内容
products.descriptionZh: 以 Quick Look 应有的方式预览文件夹和压缩包。FolderPlus 为 Mac 的 Quick Look 注入强大功能，让文件夹和压缩档案的预览变得丰富而即时。只需在任意文件夹或 ZIP 文件上按下空格键，即可直接查看内部内容——无需点击、无需等待、无需解压。这是 Quick Look 本应具备却一直缺失的功能，原生适配 macOS，并设计为融入你的日常操作流程。
products.description: Preview folders and archives the way Quick Look was meant to work. FolderPlus supercharges your Mac's Quick Look with rich, instant previews for folders and compressed archives. Just press Space on any folder or ZIP file to see exactly what's inside—no clicking, no waiting, no extracting. It's the missing feature Quick Look always should have had, built natively for macOS and designed to disappear into your everyday workflow.

products.name: Dropstone 1.5
products.tagline: 2× Claude Code Pro's usage at $15/mo
products.summaryZh: 2× Claude Code Pro 使用量，每月15美元
products.descriptionZh: Dropstone 1.5 是我们的月度重新基线版本。我们每月测试顶尖AI编程模型，并根据胜出者重建运行时。本月：DeepSeek V4 Flash、V4 Pro 和 Moonshot Kimi K2.6，均托管于美国，我方不存储任何数据。每月15美元可享受约450次深度编程会话，约为Claude Code Pro（20美元）的两倍。完整技术报告含成本计算与基准测试：blankline.org/research/dropstone-1-5
products.description: Dropstone 1.5 is our monthly re-baseline release. We test the top AI coding models every month and rebuild the runtime on whichever wins. This month: DeepSeek V4 Flash, V4 Pro, and Moonshot Kimi K2.6 all hosted in the US, nothing stored on our side. $15/month gets you about 450 deep coding sessions a week. Roughly twice what Claude Code Pro delivers at $20. Full technical report with the cost math and benchmarks: blankline.org/research/dropstone-1-5

products.name: Carbone Skill for AI
products.tagline: Teach your AI to build document templates
products.summaryZh: 教会你的AI构建文档模板
products.descriptionZh: Carbone 是一个通用文档生成引擎：只需提供模板文件和 JSON 文件，即可大规模生成像素级精准的文档。Carbone 技能可教会 Claude 或 ChatGPT 等 AI 助手完整的 Carbone 模板语言。用自然语言描述需求，AI 即可编写正确的 Carbone 语法，构建 DOCX、XLSX、PPTX、HTML 或 PDF 格式的模板，并在自动大规模渲染前验证标签。
products.description: Carbone is a universal document-generation engine: feed it a template file and JSON file, and it produces pixel-perfect documents at scale. The Carbone Skill teaches AI assistants like Claude or ChatGPT the entire Carbone templating language. Describe what you want in plain language and your AI writes correct Carbone syntax, builds templates in DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML or PDF, and validates tags before you render automatically at scale.

products.name: RadianceKit
products.tagline: Turn photos into 3D Gaussian Splats on your Mac
products.summaryZh: 在Mac上将照片转换为3D高斯点云
products.descriptionZh: RadianceKit 是首款原生 macOS 3D 高斯泼溅应用。导入任意物体或场景的照片或视频——即可在 Mac 的 GPU 上本地完成相机对齐、模型训练和逼真 3D 重建。无需 Python、CUDA 或云端。提供一键出结果的简易模式、场景预设（渲染/室外/室内）以及完整专家控制。支持导出 6 种格式、轨道视频和网页查看器。M1 及以上芯片，一次性付费 7.99 美元，3 天试用。
products.description: RadianceKit is the first native macOS app for 3D Gaussian Splatting. Drop in photos or video of any object or scene — it aligns the cameras, trains the model, and renders a photorealistic 3D reconstruction, all locally on your Mac's GPU. No Python, no CUDA, no cloud. Simple Mode for one-click results, Scene-Class Presets (Render/Outdoor/Indoor), and full Expert control. Export to 6 formats, orbit videos, and web viewers. M1+, $7.99 one-time, 3-day trial.

products.name: TaskGPT
products.tagline: Voice agent for MacOS
products.summaryZh: macOS 语音助手
products.descriptionZh: 用语音操控你的Mac。使用存储在你设备上的OpenAI/Anthropic API密钥，我们不持有任何服务器，也不保留你的任何数据。
products.description: Command your Mac with your Voice, Uses your OpenAPI/Anthropic API key stored on your machine, we own no servers and do not retain any of your data.

products.name: Walkable
products.tagline: Safety-first walking navigation to walk the safest routes
products.summaryZh: 安全优先的步行导航，选择最安全的路线
products.descriptionZh: 安全优先的步行导航。厌倦了地图为了节省3分钟而把你引向黑暗或空旷的街道？Walkable通过步行评分实时显示最安全的路线，该评分综合考虑照明、人流量、时段和实时安全信号（包括犯罪活动数据）。在“最安全”“均衡”或“最快”路线之间选择，然后安心步行。专为不愿用安全换取速度的女性、家长和旅行者设计。
products.description: Safety-first walking navigation. Tired of maps sending you through dark or empty streets just to save 3 minutes? Walkable shows you the safest routes in real time using a Walkable Score that considers lighting, foot traffic, time of day, and live safety signals (including crime activity data) Choose between Safest, Balanced, or Fastest routes, then walk with confidence. Designed for women, parents, and travelers who refuse to trade safety for speed.

products.name: Handler
products.tagline: Review AI edits like stacked PRs at generation time.
products.summaryZh: 在生成时审查AI编辑，如同审查堆叠的PR。
products.descriptionZh: 代理提出的每次编辑都附带内置说明和独立聊天。你可以询问原因、涉及内容，或要求重做。这些都不会干扰主代理的运行。
products.description: Every edit the agent proposes arrives with a built-in explanation and its own chat. Ask why, what it touches, or tell it to redo it. None of it derails the main agent.
